# GameZipper — Free Online Browser Games

> GameZipper is a free gaming platform with 533+ HTML5 browser games. No downloads, no sign-up required. Works on desktop, mobile, and Chromebooks.

## Overview
GameZipper offers 533+ free online games across categories: Puzzle, Arcade, Idle, Card, Word, Simulation, and Strategy. All games run in modern browsers using HTML5 technology. Popular titles include 2048 Galaxy, Snake, Chess, Tetris, Sudoku, Crossword, Color Sort, and Magic Sort.

## Popular Games
- [2048 Galaxy](https://gamezipper.com/2048/) — The addictive number merge puzzle
- [Snake Game](https://gamezipper.com/snake/) — Classic arcade snake action
- [Chess Online](https://gamezipper.com/chess/) — Play chess against AI
- [Tetris Classic](https://gamezipper.com/tetris/) — Iconic block-stacking puzzle
- [Sudoku](https://gamezipper.com/sudoku/) — Number logic puzzle with 3 difficulty levels
- [Crossword Puzzle](https://gamezipper.com/crossword/) — Daily crossword challenges
- [Color Sort Puzzle](https://gamezipper.com/color-sort/) — Sort colored tubes
- [Magic Sort](https://gamezipper.com/magic-sort/) — Water sorting puzzle with 1050+ levels
- [Brick Breaker](https://gamezipper.com/brick-breaker/) — Classic brick smashing arcade
- [Flappy Wings](https://gamezipper.com/flappy-wings/) — Tap-to-fly arcade challenge
- [Slope Game](https://gamezipper.com/slope/) — 3D rolling-ball endless runner
- [Level Devil](https://gamezipper.com/level-devil/) — 50 trap-filled platformer levels
- [Nut Sort](https://gamezipper.com/nut-sort/) — Sort nuts with a city-builder meta
- [Wordscapes](https://gamezipper.com/wordscapes/) — Word crossword puzzle game

## Game Categories
- [Puzzle Games](https://gamezipper.com/puzzle-games.html) — Brain teasers, sorting, block, word puzzles
- [Arcade Games](https://gamezipper.com/arcade-games.html) — Fast action, reflex challenges
- [Idle Games](https://gamezipper.com/idle-games.html) — Clicker and progression games
- [Card & Memory Games](https://gamezipper.com/card-games.html) — Memory training and card games
- [Simulation Games](https://gamezipper.com/simulation-games.html) — Restaurant, cafe, and life simulators
- [Word & Typing Games](https://gamezipper.com/word-typing-games.html) — Vocabulary and typing challenges
- [Unblocked Games](https://gamezipper.com/unblocked-games.html) — Games that work at school/work on Chromebooks

## Key Features
- No download required — all games run in browser
- No sign-up or account needed
- Works on Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge
- Mobile and tablet friendly
- Free to play forever
- Updated regularly with new games
